title: Add contact number and address to landing page

requirements.text: Display the institute's contact number (+91-9717044953) and address (Janakpuri, Delhi) prominently on the landing page — at minimum in the Footer's contact info column, and optionally in a dedicated contact section or the hero/CTA area.

quotes: CONTACT NUMBER IS +91-9717044953  ADDRESS IS JANAKPURI , DELHI

acceptanceCriteria: The phone number +91-9717044953 is visible and correctly formatted in the Footer contact section.
The address 'Janakpuri, Delhi' is visible in the Footer contact section.
Contact details are styled consistently with the existing dark navy/orange/yellow design theme.
Contact details are readable on both desktop and mobile viewports.

constraints: Do not alter the existing visual theme (dark navy/charcoal background, orange/yellow accents).
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Contact details must match exactly: phone +91-9717044953, address Janakpuri, Delhi.
nonGoals: Adding a new contact form or lead capture form.
Integrating any external map or geolocation service.
Changing the overall page layout or section structure.
